title: Test: Add performance testing
original_text: Added performance testing with Lighthouse. Implemented performance tests for page load times. Added performance tests for API response times. Implemented performance tests for memory usage. Added performance test baselines. Result: performance scores 90+.
expected_subject: test(perf): add performance testing with Lighthouse
expected_body_lines: - Implement performance tests for page load times
- Add performance tests for API response times
- Implement performance tests for memory usage
expected_command: git commit -m "test(perf): add performance testing with Lighthouse"
